violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the loading dock roll door, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Per PIC, maintenance has scheduled repair this week. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026
The walk-in freezer was observed in poor repair, with condensate accumulation on coolant lines. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2026

The door to the outside, located in the loading dock, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024

The door to the outside, located in the corner of the roll-up door, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024
There was evidence (ice in tray) of a condensate leak in the walk-in freezer. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025

The door to the outside, located in the loading dock roll-up door, is not tight-fitting. Inspector observed visible gap at lower corner of door. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024
A leak was observed at the faucet outlet at the rear prep sink. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024

The floors in the dry storage room have an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings on the floor in the dry storage room. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023

The floors in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The floors in the dry storage area have an accumulation of rodent droppings, dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the dry storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/12/2023
